description_long: This is a rectangular outdoor canopy structure with a gently arched roof made of translucent panels, supported by a sturdy metal frame. The roof is divided into multiple sections by a grid of metal beams, providing both structural integrity and a modern aesthetic. Four vertical metal posts, one at each corner, elevate the canopy and are connected by horizontal and diagonal supports for added stability. The edges of the canopy are straight and clean, with the frame slightly protruding beyond the roof panels, giving a reinforced appearance. The overall design is utilitarian yet sleek, suitable for use as a shelter in urban environments such as bus stops, walkways, or small gathering areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and weather resistance, with no visible decorative elements or branding.
description: A rectangular, arched-roof canopy with a metal frame and translucent roof panels, supported by four vertical posts. The design is modern, sturdy, and suitable for outdoor urban shelter.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the arched roof, grid-like metal frame, and two front support posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full rectangular length, straight edges, and the four vertical support posts.
description_view_2: Rear angled view mirroring the front, with the arched roof and rear support posts visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length and structural grid of the canopy.
attribute_support_structure_design: The canopy is supported by four vertical metal posts, one at each corner, connected by horizontal and diagonal beams for stability. The roof structure features a grid of metal beams that reinforce the translucent panels and distribute weight evenly.
attribute_edge_detailing: Edges are straight and reinforced by the metal frame, with no decorative trim or scalloping; the frame slightly extends beyond the roof panels for added strength.
